home.title: Jaime Burgos
home.content: I build maintainable, secure products designed to evolve.

about.title: Profile
about.content: Angular and Spring Boot for maintainable products. I work on migrations, performance, testing, and security.

experience.title: Professional Career

activities: Implemented unit tests and quality metrics for Java products with SonarQube.
Automated E2E flows and external device validation over Angular frontends.
Prototyped Angular PWAs for onboarding processes.
Integrated Meta Developers APIs for Facebook and WhatsApp Business consumption.
Built chatbot pilots and webhooks for WhatsApp Business events.
Created REST APIs with NestJS for transaction simulation and operational records.
Built a portal for tracking and registering receipts in a transport company.
Maintained an academic management portal for school grades.
Fixed issues in a medical sample management platform integrated with Auth0.
Refactored and migrated frontend applications from Angular 8 to Angular 12.
Implemented unit tests with Jasmine/Karma for SonarQube coverage.
Piloted E2E automation with Cypress over Angular applications.
Accepted contributions in angular/angular and maintained libraries such as ngx-typed-writer.
Performed security research credited in GitHub Advisories for Angular packages.
Explored SSR, PWA/TWA, Speculation Rules, performance, and modern ecosystem compatibility.
Migrated a React SPA to an Angular WebView microfrontend.
Developed and maintained Angular interfaces for digital products.
Maintained Java services, API integrations, and TypeScript flows.

experience.subtitle: Recent experience, Angular contributions, and selected education.

list.name: Systems Engineer
list.description: Graduated with strong academic performance and honor roll recognition.

proyects.name: Sky Scrapper
proyects.description: Manga price comparison across Peruvian stores. Uses Puppeteer scraping, price history, wishlists, and push discount alerts.

proyects.name: Sky Bot
proyects.description: Procedure-management chatbot with Facebook Messenger, Dialogflow, a PWA portal, Auth0, and an observable NestJS backend.

proyects.name: Sky Krono
proyects.description: PWA for attendance control, calendar workflows, push notifications, reporting dashboards, and WebAuthn authentication.
